name: neo-agents-ai
description: An AI crew embedded in your project — BA, SA, Designer, Engineer, and PM agents that interview you before producing output. Works on any project, any stack, any size.
author: jameskwi

commands.name: neo:setup
commands.description: Initialize Neo Agents AI in your project — auto-detects stack, creates config and folder structure

commands.name: neo:ba
commands.description: Run the Business Analyst agent — interviews you before writing a full BRD

commands.name: neo:sa
commands.description: Run the Solution Architect agent — reads BRD and produces SSD with technical blueprint

commands.name: neo:ds
commands.description: Run the Designer agent — produces a Claude Design prompt from BRD + SSD

commands.name: neo:dev
commands.description: Run the Engineer agent — produces the final Implementation File for Claude Code

commands.name: neo:dashboard
commands.description: Launch the Neo Agents dashboard in your browser
